MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,703.70 FILED BY KAUFMAN, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT AHIRWAR, VIGYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANDREW JAUFMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VIGYAN AHIRWAR IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAUFMAN, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AHIRWAR, VIGYAN $1,425.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.32 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,494.32, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT KAUFMAN, ANDREW RECOVER FROM APPELLANT AHIRWAR, VIGYAN $925.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $975.00 NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Vigyan Ahirwar, Appellant/Defendant
Andrew Kaufman, Respondent/Plaintiff

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Andrew Kaufman, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf.

Vigyan Ahirwar, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Robert Stumpf, Clerk Danial Lemire, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-22-2017 Judgment Entered
